title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: So I'm going to have a piece of pie now and get ready for bed.

title: will / shall
examples: You take this out, and there will be a little plastic in on top.
I've got a few souvenirs from Korea with me, so I'll give them some gifts and just catch up with them.
Oh, sure, I'll have cherry coke.
I am definitely going to sleep well after all of this good food I ate today.

title: will be doing / will have done
examples: I will be making a lot more videos like this while I'm in the US.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: The food already smells amazing, and I can't wait to dig in.
I bet you know what I have, so you can help yourself.
Yeah, you can have some of that.
I couldn't make up my mind about which kind of pie I wanted to eat.

title: If I do / If I did
examples: Sometimes if we have leftover turkey, we like to make turkey sandwiches in the evening.

title: Passive (is done / was done)
examples: And I know it was baked with love.
